titles.text: Twin Series Vol. 6: Wan Nyan Idol Gakuen + Koinu to Issho Special
ツインシリーズ Vol.6 わんにゃんアイドル学園 + 仔犬といっしょスペシャル

descriptions.text: Twin Series Vol. 6: Wan Nyon Idol Gakuen/Koinu Toissho Special is a Miscellaneous game, developed and published by Culture Brain, which was released in Japan in 2004.
